```{r species - relabun plot}
  mutate(name = ifelse(name == "Faecalibacillus intestinalis", 
                       "F. intestinalis", name)) %>% 
  mutate(name = ifelse(name == "Anaerobutyricum hallii",
                       "A. hallii", name)) %>%
  #filter out zero vals
  filter(relative_abundance > 0) %>% 
  #log transform for visualization on plot
  mutate(log_rel_abundance = log10(relative_abundance + 1e-6))


## Clean up features list the same way as in the data
features_clean <- features %>%
  str_remove("^s__") %>%
  str_remove("\\|t__SGB[0-9]+") %>%
  str_replace_all("_", " ") %>%
  ifelse(. == "Lachnospiraceae bacterium AM48 27BH", "L. bact. AM48-27BH", .) %>%
  ifelse(. == "Candidatus Cibionibacter quicibialis", "C. C. quicibialis", .) %>%
  ifelse(. == "Candidatus Avimonas narfia", "C. Avimonas narfia", .) %>%
  ifelse(. == "Mediterraneibacter butyricigenes", "M. butyricigenes", .) %>%
  ifelse(. == "Mediterraneibacter massiliensis", "M. massiliensis", .) %>% 
  ifelse(. == "Anaerotruncus rubiinfantis", "A. rubiinfantis", .) %>% 
  ifelse(. == "Sutterella wadsworthensis", "S. wadsworthensis", .) %>% 
  ifelse(. == "Faecalibacillus intestinalis", "F. intestinalis", .) %>%
  ifelse(. == "Anaerobutyricum hallii", "A. hallii", .)

## Apply factor levels to enforce order top-to-bottom
maaslin2_data.plot <- maaslin2_data.plot %>%
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = rev(features_clean)))

## Plotting
rel_abun.species <- ggplot(maaslin2_data.plot, aes(y=name, x=log_rel_abundance, color=case_con)) +
  #adding in the individual rel_abun points
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8,
                                              jitter.width = 0.1),
              shape=21, alpha = 0.12) +
  #boxplots per group per species
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(name, case_con), fill = case_con),
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha = 0.4,
               outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(y=NULL, x="log10(Relative Abundance)") +
  #manually setting colours of the groups
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  #overall theme
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_markdown(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none"
        #legend.background = element_rect(color="black", fill = NA),
        #legend.margin = margin(t=1, r=3, b=3)
        )


```

```{r pathways - relabun plot} 

## top 15 features list
features <- c(
  "PWY-7992: superpathway of menaquinol-8 biosynthesis III",
  "RIBOSYN2-PWY: flavin biosynthesis I (bacteria and plants)",
  "PWY-7883: anhydromuropeptides recycling II",
  "PWY-5130: 2-oxobutanoate degradation I",
  "PWY-7761: NAD salvage pathway II (PNC IV cycle)",
  "PWY-6876: isopropanol biosynthesis (engineered)",
  "PWY-6901: superpathway of glucose and xylose degradation",
  "P42-PWY: incomplete reductive TCA cycle",
  "PWY-8131: 5'-deoxyadenosine degradation II",
  "METHGLYUT-PWY: superpathway of methylglyoxal degradation",
  "PWY-7013: (S)-propane-1,2-diol degradation",
  "PWY-6588: pyruvate fermentation to acetone",
  "PWY-7371: 1,4-dihydroxy-6-naphthoate biosynthesis II",
  "PWY-5973: cis-vaccenate biosynthesis",
  "PWY-5920: superpathway of heme b biosynthesis from glycine"
)


## Metaphlan data
maaslin2_data.plot <- humann.path_long %>% 
  filter(name %in% features) %>% 
  select(plate_ID, name, relative_abundance) %>% 
  merge(., gmbc_data %>% select(plate_ID, single_id, collection_part, case_con)) %>% 
  mutate(case_con = factor(case_con, 
                           levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c('Control', 'Case'))) %>% 
  #clean up names
  mutate(
    name = name %>%
      str_remove(":.*$")   # remove everything from ":" to end
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    name = case_when(
      name == "PWY-7992" ~ "menaquinol-8 B (7992)",
      name == "RIBOSYN2-PWY" ~ "flavin B (ribosyn2)",
      name == "PWY-7883" ~ "murein recycling (7883)",
      name == "PWY-5130" ~ "2-oxobutanoate D (5130)",
      name == "PWY-7761" ~ "NAD salvage (7761)",
      name == "PWY-6876" ~ "isopropanol B (6876)",
      name == "PWY-6901" ~ "glucose D (6901)",
      name == "P42-PWY" ~ "reduct TCA cyc (P42)",
      name == "PWY-8131" ~ "5'-deoxyA D (8131)",
      name == "METHGLYUT-PWY" ~ "methylglyoxal D",
      name == "PWY-7013" ~ "propane-1,2-diol D (7013)",
      name == "PWY-6588" ~ "pyruvate ferm (6588)",
      name == "PWY-7371" ~ "dihyd-naphthoate B (7371)",
      name == "PWY-5973" ~ "cis-vaccenate B (5973)",
      name == "PWY-5920" ~ "heme b B (5920)",
      TRUE ~ name
    ),
    name2 = factor(name, levels = rev(c(
      "menaquinol-8 B (7992)",
      "flavin B (ribosyn2)",
      "murein recycling (7883)",
      "2-oxobutanoate D (5130)",
      "NAD salvage (7761)",
      "isopropanol B (6876)",
      "glucose D (6901)",
      "reduct TCA cyc (P42)",
      "5'-deoxyA D (8131)",
      "methylglyoxal D",
      "propane-1,2-diol D (7013)",
      "pyruvate ferm (6588)",
      "dihyd-naphthoate B (7371)",
      "cis-vaccenate B (5973)",
      "heme b B (5920)"
    )))
  ) %>% 
  #filter out zero vals
  filter(relative_abundance > 0) %>% 
  #log transform for visualization on plot
  mutate(log_rel_abundance = log10(relative_abundance + 1e-6)) 


## Plotting
rel_abun.path <- ggplot(maaslin2_data.plot, aes(y=name2, x=log_rel_abundance, color=case_con)) +
  #adding in the individual rel_abun points
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8,
                                              jitter.width = 0.1),
              shape=21, alpha = 0.1) +
  #boxplots per group per species
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(name, case_con), fill = case_con),
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha = 0.4,
               outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(y=NULL, x="log10(Relative Abundance)") + #
  #manually setting colours of the groups
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  #overall theme
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none"
        #legend.background = element_rect(color="black", fill = NA),
        #legend.margin = margin(t=1, r=3, b=3)
        )


```
        
```{r enzymes - relabun plot}

## top 15 features list
features <- c(
  "1.8.98.1",
  "3.5.1.81",
  "2.7.1.113",
  "2.5.1.120",
  "3.4.13.21",
  "1.2.99.5",
  "6.3.4.15",
  "1.4.99.6",
  "3.4.22.8",
  "4.2.1.115",
  "2.4.1.319",
  "2.4.1.329",
  "2.1.1.173",
  "1.10.9.1",
  "5.1.3.8"
)


## Metaphlan data
maaslin2_data.plot <- humann.enzymes_long %>% 
  filter(name %in% features) %>% 
  select(plate_ID, name, relative_abundance) %>% 
  mutate(name = case_when(
   name == "1.2.99.5" ~ "1.2.7.12",
   name == "1.10.9.1" ~ "7.1.1.6",
   TRUE ~ name
  )) %>% 
  #clean up names
  #mutate(name = paste0("EC ", name)) %>% 
  mutate(name2 = case_when(
      name == "1.8.98.1" ~ "DiMP:CoB-CoM Hdr(1.8.98.1)",
      name == "3.5.1.81" ~ "Daa deacylase (3.5.1.81)", #N-acyl-
      name == "2.7.1.113" ~ "DeoxyG kinase (2.7.1.113)",
      name == "2.5.1.120" ~ "ADF synthase (2.5.1.120)",
      name == "3.4.13.21" ~ "Dipeptidase E (3.4.13.21)",
      name == "1.2.7.12" ~ "F-formyl DH (1.2.7.12)",
      name == "6.3.4.15" ~ "B–BCCP ligase (6.3.4.15)",
      name == "1.4.99.6" ~ "D-Arg DH (1.4.99.6)",
      name == "3.4.22.8" ~ "Clostripain (3.4.22.8)",
      name == "4.2.1.115" ~ "UDP-GlcNAc DH (4.2.1.115)",
      name == "2.4.1.319" ~ "β1,4-MOP (2.4.1.319)",
      name == "2.4.1.329" ~ "S6FPase (2.4.1.329)",
      name == "2.1.1.173" ~ "23S G2445 MTase(2.1.1.173)",
      name == "7.1.1.6" ~ "PQ-PC reductase (7.1.1.6)",
      name == "5.1.3.8" ~ "GlcNAc 2-epimerase(5.1.3.8)",
    TRUE ~ name),
    name2 = factor(name2, levels = rev(c(
      "DiMP:CoB-CoM Hdr(1.8.98.1)",
      "Daa deacylase (3.5.1.81)",
      "DeoxyG kinase (2.7.1.113)",
      "ADF synthase (2.5.1.120)",
      "Dipeptidase E (3.4.13.21)",
      "F-formyl DH (1.2.7.12)",
      "B–BCCP ligase (6.3.4.15)",
      "D-Arg DH (1.4.99.6)",
      "Clostripain (3.4.22.8)",
      "UDP-GlcNAc DH (4.2.1.115)",
      "β1,4-MOP (2.4.1.319)",
      "S6FPase (2.4.1.329)",
      "23S G2445 MTase(2.1.1.173)",
      "PQ-PC reductase (7.1.1.6)",
      "GlcNAc 2-epimerase(5.1.3.8)"
    )))
  ) %>% 
  merge(., gmbc_data %>% select(plate_ID, single_id, collection_part, case_con)) %>% 
  mutate(case_con = factor(case_con, 
                           levels = c(0, 1), 
                           labels = c('Control', 'Case'))) %>% 
  #filter out zero vals
  filter(relative_abundance > 0) %>% 
  #log transform for visualization on plot
  mutate(log_rel_abundance = log10(relative_abundance + 1e-6))


## Plotting
rel_abun.enzymes <- ggplot(maaslin2_data.plot, aes(y=name2, x=log_rel_abundance, color=case_con)) +
  #adding in the individual rel_abun points
  geom_jitter(position = position_jitterdodge(dodge.width = 0.8,
                                              jitter.width = 0.1),
              shape=21, alpha = 0.1) +
  #boxplots per group per species
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = interaction(name, case_con), fill = case_con),
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               alpha = 0.4,
               outlier.shape = NA) +
  labs(y=NULL, x="log10(Relative Abundance)") +
  #manually setting colours of the groups
  scale_color_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL, values = c("Case" = "blue4", "Control" = "grey30")) +
  #overall theme
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(), #element_markdown(),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.position = "none"
        #legend.background = element_rect(color="black", fill = NA),
        #legend.margin = margin(t=1, r=3, b=3)
        )


```
     
```{r combined plot}

library(cowplot) 

#combine bottom row first
top_row <- plot_grid(
  rel_abun.genus, 
  rel_abun.path, 
  ncol = 2, 
  rel_widths = c(1, 1.05) 
)

bottom_row <- plot_grid(
  rel_abun.species, rel_abun.enzymes,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1.15)   # make left one wider
)


png("metagenome_relabun_2025-10-03.png", 
    width = 8 * 600, height = 9 * 600, 
    res = 600, bg = "white")

# Arrange side-by-side with custom widths
print(
  #combine everything
  plot_grid(
    top_row,
    bottom_row,
    nrow = 2
  )
)


# ENZYMES
grid.text("Genera",    x = 0.1, y = 0.53, gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Pathways", x = 0.59, y = 0.53, gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Species",  x = 0.1, y = 0.03, gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))
grid.text("Enzymes",  x = 0.59, y = 0.03, gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))



dev.off()

```


# METABOLOMICS 

OPLS-DA
```{r OPLS-DA - plasma}

library(ropls)


## Prepare Data

#dataset
oplsda <- metabo.plasma_wide %>% 
  transform_metabo(., remove_outliers = F, merge = F) %>% 
  merge(., gmbc_data %>% select(study_id, case_con))
# predictors (metabolites)
X <- oplsda %>% select(-c(case_con,study_id)) %>% as.matrix()
# outcome variable (e.g., case vs. control)
Y <- as.factor(oplsda$case_con)  



## Run OPLS-DA
opls_model <- opls(X, Y, predI = 1, orthoI = NA, permI = 100)  
  # predI = predictive components, use 1 to separate Y groups
  # orthoI = orthogonal components, NA lets ropls select best no. via CV
  # permI = permutation testing, confirms statistical validity of the model
  # R2Y = goodness of fit 
  # Q2 = cross-validated predictability


## Important Variables

vipVn.plasma <- getVipVn(opls_model) %>%   # Variable Importance in Projection (VIP) scores
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  arrange(desc(.))
#write.csv(vipVn.plasma, "vip.csv", row.names = TRUE)
#head(vipVn.plasma, 10)


## Scores Plotting

#built in plot (zoom in)
# plot(opls_model, typeVc = "x-score")  # score plot


## Scores Plotting

#predictive component scores
#extract predictive scores (p1) and orthogonal scores (o1)
p_scores <- getScoreMN(opls_model)
o_scores <- opls_model@orthoScoreMN  # slot with orthogonal components
#including group labels
scores <- data.frame(
    p1 = p_scores[, 1],
    o1 = o_scores[, 1],
    case_con = Y
  )
#get explained variance for predictive components
expl_var <- opls_model@modelDF[1]

#calculate the median coordinates for each group
medians <- scores %>%
  group_by(case_con) %>% 
  summarize(
    med_comp1 = median(p1), 
    med_comp2 = median(o1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


#build the plot
opls.plasma_plot <- ggplot(scores, aes(x = p1, y = o1, color = case_con)) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.6) +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = case_con), level = 0.95, linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "darkgray", "1" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(   
    x = paste0("Predictive Component (", round(expl_var$R2X[1], 2)*100, "% exp var)"),
    y = paste0("Orthogonal Component (", round(expl_var$R2X[2], 2)*100, "% exp var)"),
    color = "Case_Status"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines")) +
  
  #add lines from each point to the median of its group with matching colors
  geom_segment(data = scores %>% 
                 left_join(medians, by = "case_con"),
               aes(x = med_comp1, y = med_comp2, xend = p1, yend = o1,
                   color = case_con),
               linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 0.4, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  #add median points with matching colors
  geom_point(data = medians, 
             aes(x = med_comp1, y = med_comp2, color = case_con), 
             size = 3, shape = 4)  # Shape 4 is an 'x' marker


## Save file
ggsave(
  filename = "opls_2025-11-13.png",   # file name
  plot = opls.plasma_plot,                   # which plot to save
  width = 4,                  # width
  height = 4,                 # height
  units = "in",               # units: "in", "cm", or "mm"
  dpi = 600                   # resolution
)


```

```{r OPLS-DA - stool}

library(ropls)


## Prepare Data

#dataset
oplsda.stool <- metabo.stool_wide %>%
  transform_metabo(., remove_outliers = F, merge = F) %>% 
  merge(., gmbc_data %>% select(study_id, case_con))
# predictors (metabolites)
X <- oplsda.stool %>% select(-c(case_con,study_id)) %>% as.matrix()
# outcome variable (e.g., case vs. control)
Y <- as.factor(oplsda.stool$case_con)  


## Run PLS-DA (FORCE PLS-DA, no orthogonal components)
#opls_model.stool <- opls(X, Y, predI = 1, orthoI = NA, permI = 100) 
opls_model.stool <- opls(X, Y, predI = 2, orthoI = 0, permI = 100)  
  # predI = predictive components, use 1 to separate Y groups
  # orthoI = orthogonal components, NA lets ropls select best no. via CV
  # permI = permutation testing, confirms statistical validity of the model
  # R2Y = goodness of fit 
  # Q2 = cross-validated predictability


## Important Variables

vipVn.stool <- getVipVn(opls_model.stool) %>%   # Variable Importance in Projection (VIP) scores
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  arrange(desc(.))
#write.csv(vipVn.stool, "vip.csv", row.names = TRUE)
#head(vipVn.stool, 10)



#predictive component scores
#extract predictive scores (p1) and orthogonal scores (o1)
x_scores <- getScoreMN(opls_model.stool)

#including group labels
scores <- data.frame(
    p1 = x_scores[, 1],
    p2 = x_scores[, 2],
    case_con = Y
  )
#get explained variance for predictive components
expl_var <- opls_model.stool@modelDF[1]

#calculate the median coordinates for each group
medians <- scores %>%
  group_by(case_con) %>% 
  summarize(
    med_comp1 = median(p1), 
    med_comp2 = median(p2),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


#build the plot
pls.stool_plot <- ggplot(scores, aes(x = p1, y = p2, color = case_con)) +
  geom_point() +
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = case_con), level = 0.95, linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "darkgray", "1" = "blue")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(   
    x = paste0("Latent Variable 1 (", round(expl_var$R2X[1], 2)*100, "% exp var)"),
    y = paste0("Latent Variable 2 (", round(expl_var$R2X[2], 2)*100, "% exp var)"),
    color = "Case Status"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = c(1,1),#"right",
        legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
        legend.key.size = unit(0.7, "lines"),
        panel.background = element_blank(),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines")) +
  
  #add lines from each point to the median of its group with matching colors
  geom_segment(data = scores %>% 
                 left_join(medians, by = "case_con"),
               aes(x = med_comp1, y = med_comp2, xend = p1, yend = p2,
                   color = case_con),
               linewidth = 0.2, alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  #add median points with matching colors
  geom_point(data = medians, 
             aes(x = med_comp1, y = med_comp2, color = case_con), 
             size = 3, shape = 4)  # Shape 4 is an 'x' marker

pls.stool_plot

```
 
```{r combined OPLS + PLS plot}

library(cowplot)


png("metabo_opls_2025-08-18.png", 
    width = 6.5 * 600, height = 3.25 * 600, 
    res = 600, bg = "white")

# Arrange side-by-side with custom widths
print(
  plot_grid(
    opls.plasma_plot, pls.stool_plot,
    nrow = 1,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1)
  )
)
  
grid.text("A", x = unit(0.1, "npc"), y = unit(0.94, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("B", x = unit(0.6, "npc"), y = unit(0.94, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))

dev.off()


```
 
  
Logistic Regression Models   
```{r plasma logreg - apply}

#then run: iterative modeling - apply
apply_iterative.modeling(
  predictor_vars <- metabo.plasma_wide %>% select(-study_id) %>% colnames, 
  adjustment_sets <- get_covariates(),
  dataset.model <- metabo.plasma_wide %>% transform_metabo(),
  file_name <- "metabo.plasma_log2.outlier"
)


```
    
```{r plasma logreg - volcano plot}

library(readxl)

##CLASS
data_class <- read_excel("GMBC1_Data_Summary_2025-07-30.xlsx", sheet = "1.Metabo_describe")
colnames(data_class) <- as.character(unlist(data_class[1, ]))
data_class <- data_class[-1, ]
data_class <- data_class %>% 
  select(Class, Metabolite)  %>% 
  mutate(Class = ifelse(Class=="Uremic toxin", "Other", Class))

## UNADJUSTED
metabo_results <- read_excel("Logreg_metabo.plasma_log2.outlier_2025-07-24.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet_unadj") %>% select(-last_col(), -last_col(1))


# Data preparation
results <- metabo_results %>% 
  merge(., data_class, by.x="term", by.y="Metabolite", all.x=TRUE) %>% 
  #create an index number for each class
  mutate(Class_Index = as.numeric(factor(Class))) %>% 
  #mutate if sig or not
  mutate(sig = q.value < 0.25) %>% 
  #remove problematic metabolite from plot
  filter(!term %in% c("LysoPC(17:0)","LysoPE(15:0)","LysoPC(16:0)"))


## Histgram
#build
hist_data <- ggplot_build(
  ggplot(results, aes(x = OR)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 65)
)$data[[1]]
#rescale y values to negative
hist_data$y <- -hist_data$count / max(hist_data$count) / 10  # adjust height if needed

# Plot
volcano.p.0 <- ggplot() +
  #histogram (bars below 0)
  geom_col(data = hist_data, aes(x = x, y = y), fill = "black", width = hist_data$width[1]) +
  #geom points
  geom_point(data = results, aes(x=OR, y=-log10(q.value), color=Class, alpha = sig),
             size = 2) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 0.9, "FALSE" = 0.2), guide = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.25), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", alpha=1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,#"Odds Ratio",
    y = "-log10(FDR)",
    color = "Class"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.16, 3.33)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.81)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.07, 0.81)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```
  
```{r plasma logreg - volcano plot}

library(readxl)

##CLASS
data_class <- read_excel("GMBC1_Data_Summary_2025-07-30.xlsx", sheet = "1.Metabo_describe")
colnames(data_class) <- as.character(unlist(data_class[1, ]))
data_class <- data_class[-1, ]
data_class <- data_class %>% 
  select(Class, Metabolite)  %>% 
  mutate(Class = ifelse(Class=="Uremic toxin", "Other", Class))

## CONFOUNDER
metabo_results <- read_excel("Logreg_metabo.plasma_log2.outlier_2025-07-24.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet_confounder_vars") %>% select(-last_col(), -last_col(1))


# Data preparation
results <- metabo_results %>% 
  merge(., data_class, by.x="term", by.y="Metabolite", all.x=TRUE) %>% 
  #create an index number for each class
  mutate(Class_Index = as.numeric(factor(Class))) %>% 
  #mutate if sig or not
  mutate(sig = q.value < 0.25) %>% 
  #remove problematic metabolite from plot
  filter(!term %in% c("LysoPC(17:0)","LysoPE(15:0)","LysoPC(16:0)"))

## Histgram
#build
hist_data <- ggplot_build(
  ggplot(results, aes(x = OR)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 100)
)$data[[1]]
#rescale y values to negative
hist_data$y <- -hist_data$count / max(hist_data$count) / 10  # adjust height if needed

# Plot
volcano.p.1 <- ggplot() +
  #histogram (bars below 0)
  geom_col(data = hist_data, aes(x = x, y = y), fill = "black", width = hist_data$width[1]) +
  #geom points
  geom_point(data = results, aes(x=OR, y=-log10(q.value), color=Class, alpha = sig),
             size = 2) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 0.9, "FALSE" = 0.2), guide = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.25), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", alpha=1) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,#"Odds Ratio",
    y = NULL,#"-log10(FDR)",
    color = "Class"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.16, 3.33)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.81)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.07, 0.81)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```


```{r stool logreg - apply}

#then run: iterative modeling - apply
apply_iterative.modeling(
  predictor_vars <- metabo.stool_wide %>% select(-study_id) %>% colnames, 
  adjustment_sets <- get_covariates(),
  dataset.model <- metabo.stool_wide %>% transform_metabo(),
  file_name <- "metabo.stool_log2.outlier"
)

```
  
```{r stool logreg - volcano plot}

library(readxl)

##CLASS
data_class <- read_excel("GMBC1_Data_Summary_2025-07-30.xlsx", sheet = "1.Metabo_describe")
colnames(data_class) <- as.character(unlist(data_class[1, ]))
data_class <- data_class[-1, ]
data_class <- data_class %>% select(Class, Metabolite) %>% 
  mutate(Class = ifelse(Class=="Uremic toxin", "Other", Class))

## UNADJUSTED
metabo_results <- read_excel("Logreg_metabo.stool_log2.outlier_2025-07-24.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet_unadj")


# Data preparation
results <- metabo_results %>% 
  merge(., data_class, by.x="term", by.y="Metabolite", all.x=TRUE) %>% 
  #create an index number for each class
  mutate(Class_Index = as.numeric(factor(Class))) %>% 
  #mutate if sig or not
  mutate(sig = q.value < 0.25) #%>%  # & p.value < 0.05
  #remove problematic metabolite from plot
  #filter(!term %in% c("LysoPC(17:0)","LysoPC(16:0)"))

## Histgram
#build
hist_data <- ggplot_build(
  ggplot(results, aes(x = OR)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 100)
)$data[[1]]
#rescale y values to negative
hist_data$y <- -hist_data$count / max(hist_data$count) / 2.5  # adjust height if needed

# Plot
volcano.s.0 <- ggplot() +
  #histogram (bars below 0)
  geom_col(data = hist_data, aes(x = x, y = y), fill = "black", width = hist_data$width[1]) +
  #geom points
  geom_point(data = results, aes(x=OR, y=-log10(q.value), color=Class, alpha = sig),
             size = 2) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 0.9, "FALSE" = 0.2), guide = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.25), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", alpha=1) +
  labs(
    x = "Odds Ratio",
    y = "-log10(FDR)",
    color = "Class"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.7, 2.2)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.25, 3.1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


```
       
```{r stool logreg - volcano plot}

library(readxl)

##CLASS
data_class <- read_excel("GMBC1_Data_Summary_2025-07-30.xlsx", sheet = "1.Metabo_describe")
colnames(data_class) <- as.character(unlist(data_class[1, ]))
data_class <- data_class[-1, ]
data_class <- data_class %>% select(Class, Metabolite) %>% 
  mutate(Class = ifelse(Class=="Uremic toxin", "Other", Class))

## CONFOUNDER
metabo_results <- read_excel("Logreg_metabo.stool_log2.outlier_2025-07-24.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet_confounder_vars")


# Data preparation
results <- metabo_results %>% 
  merge(., data_class, by.x="term", by.y="Metabolite", all.x=TRUE) %>% 
  #create an index number for each class
  mutate(Class_Index = as.numeric(factor(Class))) %>% 
  #mutate if sig or not
  mutate(sig = q.value < 0.25) #%>% 
  #remove problematic metabolite from plot
  #filter(!term %in% c("LysoPC(17:0)","LysoPC(16:0)"))

## Histgram
#build
hist_data <- ggplot_build(
  ggplot(results, aes(x = OR)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 100)
)$data[[1]]
#rescale y values to negative
hist_data$y <- -hist_data$count / max(hist_data$count) / 2.5  # adjust height if needed

# Plot
volcano.s.1 <- ggplot() +
  #histogram (bars below 0)
  geom_col(data = hist_data, aes(x = x, y = y), fill = "black", width = hist_data$width[1]) +
  #geom points
  geom_point(data = results, aes(x=OR, y=-log10(q.value), color=Class, alpha = sig),
             size = 2) +
  scale_alpha_manual(values = c("TRUE" = 0.9, "FALSE" = 0.2), guide = "none") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.25), linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "solid", color = "black", alpha=1) +
  labs(
    x = "Odds Ratio",
    y = NULL, #"-log10(FDR)",
    color = "Metabolite Class"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.7, 2.2)) +
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 3.1)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.25, 3.1)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  theme(
    #legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6.8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.position = c(1, 0.98),    # inside top right (x,y in npc)
    legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
    legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "lines"),
    #legend.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm"), 
    #legend.spacing.x = unit(0.1, "cm"), 
    text = element_text(size = 14)
   ) +
   guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE)) # make it compact


```
 
```{r logreg combined plot}

library(cowplot)

png("metabo_logreg_2025-08-18.png", 
    width = 6.5 * 600, height = 6 * 600, 
    res = 600, bg = "white")

# Arrange side-by-side with custom widths
print(
  plot_grid(
    volcano.p.0, volcano.p.1,
    volcano.s.0, volcano.s.1,
    legend,
    nrow = 2,
    ncol = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1,1,1,1)
  )
)

grid.text("A", x = unit(0.11, "npc"), y = unit(0.975, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("B", x = unit(0.58, "npc"), y = unit(0.975, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("C", x = unit(0.1, "npc"), y = unit(0.47, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))

grid.text("D", x = unit(0.58, "npc"), y = unit(0.47, "npc"), 
          gp = gpar(fontsize = 15, fontface = "bold"))


dev.off()

```


```{r metabo OR plot}

library(svglite)
library(openxlsx)
library(gridExtra)
library(grid)
library(ggtext)


## if repeated name, turn to ""


## Read in and format data
metabo_OR <- read.xlsx("OR_plot_2025-08-15.xlsx") %>%
  mutate(
    metabolite = str_replace(metabolite, "^plasma", "*plasma*"),  # italicize plasma
    metabolite = str_replace(metabolite, "^stool", "*stool*"),    # italicize stool
    metabolite = factor(metabolite, levels = c(
      #phytoestrogens
      "*plasma* – Genistein","*stool* – Genistein",
      "*plasma* – Daidzein","*stool* – Daidzein",
      "Glycitein","Matairesinol","Pinoresinol",
      #steroid-hormones
      "Estriol","16a-Hydroxyestrone",
      "*plasma* – DHEA-sulfate","*stool* – DHEA-sulfate",
      "Androsterone 3-sulfate",
      #bile acids
      "Murocholic acid",
      "Dehydrocholic acid","12-Ketochenodeoxycholic acid","7-Ketodeoxycholic acid",
      "Hyodeoxycholic acid","Lithocholic acid","Dioxolithocholic acid",
      "Glycoursodeoxycholic acid",
      "Cholic acid 3-sulfate","Hyocholic acid 3-sulfate",
      "Taurolithocholic acid","Tauroursodeoxycholic acid 3-sulfate",
      "Lithocholic acid 3-sulfate",
      "Deoxycholic acid 3-sulfate","Ursodeoxycholic acid 3-sulfate",
      "*plasma* – Ursodeoxycholic acid 7-sulfate","*stool* – Ursodeoxycholic acid 7-sulfate",
      #carnitines
      "Acetyl-carnitine",
      "Adipoyl-carnitine","Arachidonoyl-carnitine",
      "Butyryl-carnitine",
      "*plasma* – Glutaryl-carnitine","*stool* – Glutaryl-carnitine",
      "Hexanoyl-carnitine",
      "*plasma* – Linoleyl-carnitine","*stool* – Linoleyl-carnitine",
      "3-Methylglutaryl-carnitine","3-Methylcrotonyl-L-carnitine",
      "Octanoyl-carnitine","Oleoyl-carnitine",
      "Palmitoyl-carnitine","Stearoyl-carnitine",
      #other
      "*plasma* – Hypoxanthine","*stool* – Hypoxanthine",
      "*plasma* – Caproic acid","*stool* – Caproic acid",
      "Methionine","LysoPC(15:0)","p-Cresol sulfate"
    )))


## Build the HR plot
or_plot <- ggplot(metabo_OR, aes(y = fct_rev(metabolite), x = OR, shape = group, color = group)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower_CI, xmax = upper_CI), height = 0.4) +
  geom_point(size = 2.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.00, 6), breaks = c(0.0,0.5,1.0,1.5,2,2.5,3,3.5,4)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("plasma" = "darkred", "stool" = "darkblue")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("plasma" = 16, "stool" = 15)) +
  # Add annotations for HR and CI values to the right of the CI bars
  geom_text(aes(x = 4.5, 
                label = ifelse(!is.na(OR), sprintf("%.2f (%.2f–%.2f)      %.3f", 
                                                   OR, lower_CI, 
                                                   case_when(
                                                     metabolite=="Acetyl-carnitine" ~ 6.14,
                                                     upper_CI==4.44 ~ 7.92,
                                                     TRUE ~ upper_CI
                                                   ), 
                                                   q_value), "")),
                hjust = 0, size = 2.9, colour = "black") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_markdown(hjust=1), 
    #axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position = c(0.55, 0.95), #"bottom",
    legend.background = element_rect(color = "black", fill = "white"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.8, "lines"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(0.75, 0.5, 0.2, 0.5), "cm") 
  ) + 
  labs(color="Metabolite matrix",
       shape="Metabolite matrix")


or_plot


### SAVING THE PLOT

png("metabo_OR_2025-09-03.png", 
    width = 7.5 * 600, height = 8.25 * 600, 
    res = 600, bg = "white")

print(or_plot)
# Add the column titles 
grid.text("OR (95% CI)                                                       OR (95% CI)   q-value", 
          x = 0.685, y = 0.975, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"))


dev.off()


```



# MULTI-OMICS


DIABLO

```{r DIABLO - data prep (all features) }

### DATA PREPARATION

#species selection
X.species <- metaphlan4_wide.t %>% 
  transform_metagenomics() %>% 
  select(study_id, 
         "s__Anaerotruncus_rubiinfantis|t__SGB25416",
          "s__Alistipes_shahii|t__SGB2295",
          "s__Lachnospiraceae_bacterium_AM48_27BH|t__SGB4706",
          "s__Alistipes_finegoldii|t__SGB2301",
          "s__Blautia_obeum|t__SGB4811",
          "s__Sutterella_wadsworthensis|t__SGB9286",
          "s__Alistipes_putredinis|t__SGB2318",
          "s__Mediterraneibacter_massiliensis|t__SGB4595",
          "s__Candidatus_Avimonas_narfia|t__SGB14941",
          "s__Mediterraneibacter_butyricigenes|t__SGB25493",
          "s__Blautia_SGB4815|t__SGB4815",
          "s__Faecalibacillus_intestinalis|t__SGB6754",
          "s__Clostridium_fessum|t__SGB4705",
          "s__Candidatus_Cibionibacter_quicibialis|t__SGB15286",
          "s__Anaerobutyricum_hallii|t__SGB4532",
          "s__GGB3057_SGB4059|t__SGB4059"
         ) %>% 
  drop_na() %>% 
  rename_with(
    ~ .x %>%
      sub("^s__", "", .) %>%                     # remove s__ at start
      sub("\\|t__SGB[0-9]+$", "", .) %>%         # remove |t__SGB### at end
      gsub("_", " ", .),                         # replace underscores with spaces
    .cols = -study_id
  ) %>% 
  rename("L. bacterium AM48-27BH" = "Lachnospiraceae bacterium AM48 27BH",
         "C. Avimonas narfia" = "Candidatus Avimonas narfia",
         "C. Cibionibacter quicibialis" = "Candidatus Cibionibacter quicibialis") %>% 
  arrange(study_id) %>% 
  column_to_rownames("study_id")

#enzyme selection
X.enzymes <- humann.enzymes_wide %>%
  transform_metagenomics() %>%
  select(study_id, 
          "1.8.98.1",
          "3.5.1.81",
          "2.7.1.113",
          "2.5.1.120",
          "3.4.13.21",
          "1.2.99.5", #1.2.7.12
          "6.3.4.15",
          "1.4.99.6",
          "3.4.22.8",
          "4.2.1.115",
          "2.4.1.319",
          "2.4.1.329",
          "2.1.1.173",
          "1.10.9.1", #7.1.1.6
          "5.1.3.8",
          "2.1.1.61"
         ) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("EC ", .x), .cols = -study_id) %>% 
  rename("EC 1.2.7.12" = "EC 1.2.99.5",
         "EC 7.1.1.6" = "EC 1.10.9.1") %>% 
  arrange(study_id) %>%
  column_to_rownames("study_id")

X.plasma  <- metabo.plasma_wide %>%
  transform_metabo(remove_outliers=F, merge=F) %>%
  select(study_id,
         "Genistein","Matairesinol","Murocholic.acid",
         "3-Methylglutaryl-carnitine","16a-Hydroxyestrone",
         "Daidzein","DHEA-sulfate","Hyocholic.acid.3-sulfate",
         "Estriol.(E3)","Hypoxanthine", "Pinoresinol", 
         "Glycoursodeoxycholic.acid","Hexanoyl-carnitine",
         "Linoleyl-carnitine","LysoPC(15:0)","Caproic.acid",
        "Glutaryl-carnitine","Methionine"
         ) %>%
  drop_na() %>% 
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\.", " ", .x), .cols = -study_id) %>% 
  rename("Estriol" = "Estriol (E3)") %>% 
  arrange(study_id) %>%
  column_to_rownames("study_id")

X.stool  <- metabo.stool_wide %>%
  transform_metabo(remove_outliers=F, merge=F) %>%
  select(study_id,
         "Adipoyl-carnitine","Genistein","DHEA-sulfate",
         "Octanoyl-carnitine","Oleoyl-carnitine","Palmitoyl-carnitine",
         "Butyryl-carnitine","Ursodeoxycholic.acid.7-sulfate",
         "Linoleyl-carnitine","Cholic.acid.3-sulfate",
         "3-Methylcrotonyl-L-carnitine","7-Ketodeoxycholic.acid",
         "Androsterone.3-sulfate","Glutaryl-carnitine","Daidzein",
         #Model 1 only, lower down
         "Lithocholic.acid.3-sulfate",
         "Cholic.acid.3-sulfate","Stearoyl-carnitine",
         "Deoxycholic.acid.3-sulfate",
         "Dioxolithocholic.acid","Hyodeoxycholic.acid",
         "12-Ketochenodeoxycholic.acid","Ursodeoxycholic.acid.3-sulfate",
         "Glycoursodeoxycholic.acid"
         ) %>% 
  drop_na() %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("\\.", " ", .x), .cols = -study_id) %>% 
  arrange(study_id) %>%
  column_to_rownames("study_id")



#enzyme selection
X.pathways <- humann.path_wide %>%
  transform_metagenomics() %>%
  select(study_id, 
    "PWY-7992: superpathway of menaquinol-8 biosynthesis III",
    "RIBOSYN2-PWY: flavin biosynthesis I (bacteria and plants)",
    "PWY-7883: anhydromuropeptides recycling II",
    "PWY-5130: 2-oxobutanoate degradation I",
    "PWY-7761: NAD salvage pathway II (PNC IV cycle)",
    "PWY-6876: isopropanol biosynthesis (engineered)",
    "PWY-6901: superpathway of glucose and xylose degradation",
    "P42-PWY: incomplete reductive TCA cycle",
    "PWY-8131: 5'-deoxyadenosine degradation II",
    "METHGLYUT-PWY: superpathway of methylglyoxal degradation",
    "PWY-7013: (S)-propane-1,2-diol degradation",
    "PWY-6588: pyruvate fermentation to acetone",
    "PWY-7371: 1,4-dihydroxy-6-naphthoate biosynthesis II",
    "PWY-5973: cis-vaccenate biosynthesis",
    "PWY-5920: superpathway of heme b biosynthesis from glycine"
    ) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  rename_with(~ sub(":.*", "", .x), .cols = -study_id) %>% 
  arrange(study_id) %>%
  column_to_rownames("study_id")

```
 
```{r DIABLO - run and plot }
  
### DATA PREPARATION ####

#Filter so that all contain the sample study_ids
shared_ids <- Reduce(intersect, 
                     list(rownames(X.species), rownames(X.enzymes),
                          rownames(X.pathways),
                          rownames(X.plasma), rownames(X.stool)))

#dropping outlier participants
shared_ids <- setdiff(shared_ids, c("GMBC_130", "GMBC_122"))
X.species <- X.species[shared_ids, ]
X.enzymes <- X.enzymes[shared_ids, ]
X.pathways <- X.pathways[shared_ids, ]
X.plasma <- X.plasma[shared_ids, ]
X.stool <- X.stool[shared_ids, ]

# Combine all dataframes into a single 
X <- list(species = X.species, enzymes = X.enzymes, pathways = X.pathways,
          plasma_metabolites = X.plasma, stool_metabolites = X.stool )

#Outcome (also filter for id)
Y <- gmbc_data %>% 
  filter(study_id %in% shared_ids) %>% 
  pull(case_con) %>% 
  as.factor()


### APPLY multiblock PLS-DA ####

library(mixOmics)  #beware, this overrides select function in dplyr and makes it not work properly
library(dplyr)

#run function
diablo_result <- block.splsda(X, Y, 
                              ncomp = 2, #default, first two PLS comp calculated
                              design = "full", #default, strength all relationships between df maximized
                              scale = TRUE) #default, each bloc standardized to zero means and unit variances


## Performance ####

# run repeated CV performance evaluation
perf.diablo = perf(diablo_result, validation = 'Mfold', 
                   M = 10, nrepeat = 10, 
                   dist = 'centroids.dist') 

perf.diablo$MajorityVote.error.rate
perf.diablo$WeightedVote.error.rate


# Use auroc to get ROC/AUC
# roc_diablo <- auroc(diablo_result, roc.comp = 1)


## DIAGNOSTIC PLOTS ####

# Component Correlation plots
plotDiablo(diablo_result, ncomp=1, object.size=10)
plotDiablo(diablo_result, ncomp=2)

# Plot to visualize sample separation across components
plotIndiv(diablo_result, comp = 1:2, group = Y, legend=T) # plot the samples

 
# Plot to show agreement of each sample across blocks (consistency)
plotArrow(diablo_result, group=Y)

## Correlation Circle Plot ####

#pull coords into df
var_coords <- plotVar(diablo_result, comp = c(1, 2), plot = FALSE)
# Create a single-row data frame to define the unit circle
circle_df <- data.frame(
  x0 = c(0, 0),
  y0 = c(0, 0),
  r  = c(1, 0.55)  # outer and inner circle
)
# Add correlation magnitude
var_coords$r <- sqrt(var_coords$x^2 + var_coords$y^2)
# Binary alpha: light if r < 0.5, darker if >= 0.5
var_coords$alpha <- ifelse(var_coords$r < 0.55, 0.2, 0.8)
#plotting
library(ggforce)
ggplot(var_coords, aes(x = x, y = y, color = Block, shape = Block)) +
  geom_point(aes(alpha = alpha), size = 3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = names), size = 2, vjust = -1, hjust = 0.5) +  # tiny labels
  ggforce::geom_circle(data = circle_df, aes(x0 = x0, y0 = y0, r = r),
                       inherit.aes = FALSE,
                       color = "darkgrey", linetype = "solid") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dotted") +
  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("species" = "blue", "plasma_metabolites" = "orange",
                                "stool_metabolites" = "purple", "enzymes" = "darkgreen",
                                "pathways" = "red", "covariates" = 'grey20'
                                )) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("species" = 16, "plasma_metabolites" = 17,
                                "stool_metabolites" = 15, "enzymes" = 8,
                                "pathways" = 18, "covariates" = 3
                                )) +
  scale_alpha_identity() +  # use alpha as-is
  labs(x = "Component 1", y = "Component 2") +
  theme(
    #legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),  # remove grid lines
    legend.title = element_blank()
    )




## CIRCOS PLOT  ####

# Circular version of the network plot, good for high-dim data
circosPlot(diablo_result, comp=2, cutoff=0.35, #comp=1 cutoff=0.58
           #line=TRUE,
           color.blocks = c("darkgoldenrod3","darkolivegreen3", "darkgreen",
                            "brown3","chocolate4"
                            ),
           color.cor = c("red","darkblue"),
           #showIntraLinks=TRUE,
           size.labels = 1,
           size.variables = 0.34
           )

# Get the similarity matrix
sim_matrix <- circosPlot(diablo_result, comp = 1, cutoff = 0.55, plot = FALSE)
# Convert matrix to long format
sim_df <- as.data.frame(sim_matrix) %>%
  mutate(Feature1 = rownames(sim_matrix)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -Feature1,
    names_to = "Feature2",
    values_to = "Correlation"
  ) %>%
  filter(abs(Correlation) >= 0.55) %>% #apply cut off
  filter(Feature1 != Feature2) %>%  #remove self-correlations
  #Remove duplicate pairs by sorting Feature1/Feature2 alphabetically
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    f1 = min(c(Feature1, Feature2)),
    f2 = max(c(Feature1, Feature2))
  ) %>%
  ungroup() #%>%
sim_df <- sim_df[, !names(sim_df) %in% c("Feature1", "Feature2")]
sim_df <- distinct(sim_df)
 

# Network Plot

network(diablo_result, cutoff=0.5)#,        
        # save = 'jpeg', 
        # name.save = 'DIABLO_network')



## FEATURE SELECTION ####

#Feature selection and interpretation (show top contributing variables per component, per block)
#threshold of importance >0.1

plotLoadings(diablo_result, comp = 1, block="species")
plotLoadings(diablo_result, comp = 2, block="species")

#species
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$species$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$species$value# %>% view()

selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$enzymes$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$enzymes$value# %>% view()

selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$pathways$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$pathways$value# %>% view()

selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$plasma_metabolite$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$plasma_metabolite$value# %>% view()

selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$stool_metabolite$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$stool_metabolite$value# %>% view()

selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 1)$covariates$value #%>% view()
selectVar(diablo_result, comp = 2)$covariates$value# %>% view()



```
